task_completion.description: Access the visitor management system or source dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a spreadsheet, database, or visitor management application open with the source visitor records.

task_completion.description: Filter records by the target month and specified companies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing active filters, search queries, or sorting for 'December 2025' and the companies: Johnson & Johnson, Pfizer Inc, Merck & Co, UnitedHealth Group, and Abbott Laboratories.

task_completion.description: Include the specific columns required for the audit report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The compiled report shows headers or columns for visitor name, company, visit purpose, host name, and host department.

task_completion.description: Compile the correct 5 visitor records into the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final report contains exactly 5 records corresponding to James Smith, Patricia Williams, Elizabeth Moore, Donald Hall, and Sandra Carter.

task_completion.description: Export the report to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a 'Save As' dialog, file manager, or terminal confirming the file is saved as 'pharma_healthcare_visitor_audit.csv' on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).

integrity.description: The agent extracted data from the source system rather than hallucinating or hardcoding the answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the source dataset (e.g., filtering, reading, copying) rather than just typing the final names directly into a new file without looking them up.

integrity.description: The agent used appropriate applications to create the CSV.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) or text editor being used to construct the CSV, showing genuine interaction with the desktop environment.

integrity.description: The output is formatted as a proper CSV or spreadsheet.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final file is shown with a tabular data structure (rows and comma-separated columns or spreadsheet cells) matching the required fields, not just a plain text paragraph.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct audit report must contain exactly 5 records for December 2025. The expected visitors are: James Smith (Johnson & Johnson), Patricia Williams (Pfizer Inc), Elizabeth Moore (UnitedHealth Group), Donald Hall (Merck & Co), and Sandra Carter (Abbott Laboratories). The required columns are visitor name, company, visit purpose, host name, and host department. The file must be saved to /home/ga/Desktop/pharma_healthcare_visitor_audit.csv.
